description: Composition Orange kurta made of a blended fabric, has a V-neck with green and red piping, mock buttoned closure with fabric covered buttons, short sleeves with green and red piping, and floral print from the waist to the hem Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only Vintage weaves, classic cuts and contemporary style - all come together in this kurta from diva. Crafted from a soft blended fabric, it offers exemplary comfort all day. Pair it with patialas or churidars and embellished slippers for an ethnic look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5’9”, chest 33” and shoulders 15.5”
